function.rulebook_notes: Performed required identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context). Read nested AGENTS.MD files when entering folders. Resolved entity first, then searched projects by structured entity alias and read every referenced canonical README before citing names.
function.outcome_justification: 10_entities/cast/nina.md identifies alias `nina` as a partner candidate; 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md ties the 'design_partner' qualifier to related_entity Nina Schreiber; project records 40_projects/2026_04_01_helios_workflow_sprint/README.MD and 40_projects/2026_03_04_northstar_ledger/README.MD both include linked entity.nina, establishing involvement.
